title: Gree GMV Mini status and function codes
description: Manual-bound outdoor main-board status, commissioning, debug, and function entries from the GMV Mini/System II service manual.
sourceName: Gree GMV Mini Slim Side Outlet Service Manual
sourceReference: Outdoor main-board status display table, PDF page 83 / manual page 79
notes: GMV Mini slim side-outlet manual boundary; document code GC202510-XIX. These codes are status/function displays, not standalone fault conclusions.
